title: Input Sanitizer
constraints: You must sanitize input before it reaches the LLM
The agent must still process the cleaned version of the user's request
Do not reject messages outright — strip dangerous content and proceed
hints: Use a regular expression or an HTML parsing library to strip tags from the input
Apply sanitization as a preprocessing step before passing input to the agent
Consider edge cases like nested tags, encoded entities, and script attributes

starterCode.openai-agents-sdk:
from agents import Agent, Runner

agent = Agent(
    name="Support Assistant",
    instructions="You are a helpful customer support assistant.",
)

# BUG: Raw user input with HTML/script tags is passed directly to the agent
user_input = 'Hello <script>alert("xss")</script> can you help me?'

result = Runner.run_sync(agent, user_input)
print(result.final_output)
starterCode.langchain:
from langchain_openai import ChatOpenAI
from langchain.agents import AgentExecutor, create_tool_calling_agent
from langchain_core.prompts import ChatPromptTemplate
from langchain_core.tools import tool

@tool
def lookup_account(name: str) -> str:
    """Look up a customer account by name."""
    return f"Account found for {name}"

llm = ChatOpenAI(model="gpt-4o-mini")

prompt = ChatPromptTemplate.from_messages([
    ("system", "You are a helpful customer support assistant."),
    ("human", "{input}"),
    ("placeholder", "{agent_scratchpad}"),
])

agent = create_tool_calling_agent(llm, [lookup_account], prompt)
executor = AgentExecutor(agent=agent, tools=[lookup_account])

# BUG: Raw user input with HTML/script tags is passed directly to the agent
user_input = 'Hello <script>alert("xss")</script> can you help me?'

result = executor.invoke({"input": user_input})
print(result["output"])
starterCode.crewai:
from crewai import Agent, Task, Crew

assistant = Agent(
    role="Support Assistant",
    goal="Help customers with their questions",
    backstory="You are a helpful customer support assistant.",
)

# BUG: Raw user input with HTML/script tags is passed directly to the agent
user_input = 'Hello <script>alert("xss")</script> can you help me?'

task = Task(
    description=user_input,
    expected_output="A helpful response",
    agent=assistant,
)

crew = Crew(agents=[assistant], tasks=[task])
result = crew.kickoff()
print(result)

evaluationCriteria.label: HTML and script tags are stripped
evaluationCriteria.description: All HTML elements and script tags are removed from user input before processing

evaluationCriteria.label: Legitimate message content preserved
evaluationCriteria.description: The actual text content of the user's message is kept intact after sanitization

evaluationCriteria.label: Agent still responds helpfully
evaluationCriteria.description: The agent processes the sanitized input and returns a useful response
